name: 02 — Approval Queue Digest & Stale Reminder (Daily 08:00)
_comment: Runs daily at 08:00. Fetches approval queue and stale digests from the API (which computes them from live data) and fires outbound webhooks to Zapier/email if there are items. No business logic in n8n.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'queue_updated', payload: { totalPending: $json.totalPending, recommendedCount: $json.recommendedCount, highFitCount: $json.highFitCount, summary: $json.summary, topOpportunities: $json.topOpportunities } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'stale_reminder', payload: { totalStale: $json.totalStale, ghostedCount: $json.ghostedCount, summary: $json.summary, items: $json.items } }) }}
